text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was so stunned this morning! The whole dorm
got together to make me a home-cooked
breakfast!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, everyone's been hard at work on the idea
since yesterday. We wanted to make sure you
really liked it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I... I tried making some things too. Grilled
chicken, soy-milk cake... That kind of stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It's all high-protein food, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's great! You didn't just make me food, you
made something that's good for my muscles!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Dober, you're awesome. You really get me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're making it into a bigger deal than it is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But... yeah, you're right. I want to know you as best as I can.
